column1: Hi, I need help with my order. It hasn't arrived yet.
The payment failed but money was deducted from my account.
How do I reset my password? I forgot it.
Your product is amazing! Best purchase ever.
I want to cancel my subscription effective immediately.
Can you provide tracking information for order #12345?
The mobile app keeps crashing on my iPhone.
Please update my shipping address to the new location.
